alpha_v0.1.description:
The humble beginnings of Goldeneye for Archipelago by that guy you remember making video game covers when you were in high school.

Items:

- All guns (individually or progressive)
- Level Unlocks

Locations:

- Objective Clears (per map or per difficulty)
- Level Clears (per map or per difficulty)

Traps:

- Goldeneye Trap :^)

Known issues:

- Random crashes that require a full close and reopen of Bizhawk. Progress should be saved when you reopen.
- Bond takes out his starting gun sometimes but then he puts it away again remembering the rules. Uses it to bludgeon guards.
- Deathlink sometimes doesn't trigger, namely usually the first one.
- Recieving Deathlink makes a garbled mess on the screen. Do not fear child, that is the debug menu.
alpha_v0.1.title: Goldeneye AP v0.1
